mapper.insert:
insert into sys_post_menu(post_id, menu_id, tenant_id) values
(#{item.postId},#{item.menuId},#{item.tenantId})
mapper.select: select menu_id from sys_post_menu where post_id=#{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE pm FROM sys_post_menu pm INNER JOIN sys_post p ON p.post_id = pm.post_id AND p.tenant_id = #{tenantId} LEFT JOIN hc_customer_menu cm ON cm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND cm.menu_id = pm.menu_id WHERE cm.menu_id IS NULL
